mfa_select.title: Choose Verification Method
mfa_select.subtitle: Select how you want to verify your identity
mfa_select.totp_description: Use a code from your authenticator app
mfa_select.webauthn_description: Use your security key or biometrics

mfa_no_fallback.title: Cannot Complete Login
mfa_no_fallback.description: We cannot verify your identity with your current device.
mfa_no_fallback.explanation: You have two-factor authentication enabled but no alternative verification method is available on this device. To access your account, you will need to go through the account recovery process.

codeInvalid: Please enter a valid 6-digit verification code
errorRecovery: Session timed out. Please try again.

setup_mfa.title: Enable Two-Factor Authentication
setup_mfa.description: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app (e.g., Google Authenticator, Authy), then enter the code below to verify.

setup_mfa_email.title: Verify Your Email
setup_mfa_email.enter_code: Enter it below to enable email-based 2FA.

recovery_codes.title: Two-Factor Authentication Enabled
recovery_codes.subtitle: Save your recovery codes in a secure location
recovery_codes.acknowledge: I have saved my recovery codes in a secure location
recovery_codes.file_important: Keep these codes safe. Each code can only be used once.
